Headline: #47 47th Temporary Reroute near 47th/State
ShortDescription: 47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 47th/State, due to a street blockage near 47th/State.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 47th/State, due to a street blockage near 47th/State.

Eastbound #47 47th buses will operate via 47th, Wells, 51st, Wabash, 47th and over regular route.

Westbound #47 47th buses will operate via 47th, Wabash, 51st, Wentworth, and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
